folio.label: 78r
folio.l: Hire thougút it swal , so sore a boute hire hert
That nedely som word , hire must a stert
And sithe she durst nat , telle it to noman
¢ Doun to a Mareys , fast by , she ran
Til she come there , hire hert was a fyre
And as a bytore , bumbletú in the myre
She leid hire moutú , vn to the water dounö
Bewreye me nat , thow water witú thy sounö
Quod she , to the I telle it and no moo
Myn husbonde hatú longe , asshassesasshasses Eres twoo
Now is myn hert al hol , now is it oute
I mygút no lengere kepe it , out of doute
Here may ©e se , thougú we a tyme a byde
ñet out it must , we conne no counseil hide
The remenau~t of the tale , if ©e wol here
Redetú Ouyde , and there ©e may it lere
¢ This knygút of whiche , my tale is specially
Whan that he saw , he mygút nougút come ther by
This is to seyn , what wommen louen most
Witú Inne his breest , ful sorweful was the goost
But hom he gotú , he mygút nat soiourne
The day was comen , æ homward must he turne
And in his wey , as happed hi~ to ride
In al his care , vnder a Forest side
Where as he sey , vp on a daunce goo
Of ladyes foure and twenty , and ©et moo
Toward the whicú daunce , he drow ful ©erne
In hope that he , sum wysdom shulde lerne
But certeynly , h h er he cam fully there
I vanysshed was this daunce , he nyst where
No creature saw he , that bar lyf´
Saue oon the grene , he saw sittyngö a wyf´
A foulere wygút , there may noman deuyse
A geyn the knygút , this olde wyf gan aryse
And seide , sire knygút , herefortúhere fortúhere,fortú ne litú no wey here fortú974There is a vertical space marker between these two words.Est
Telle me , what that ©e seken , be ©oure fey
î auenture , it may the bettir be
Theise olde folk , conne mechil goodthynggoodthyng q¶ she
My leue Moder , q¶ this knygút certeyn
I nam but ded , but if that I can seyn
What thyngö it is , that wommen most desire
Coude ©e me wysse , I wolde wel quyte ©ourö hire
Plygút me thy trouthe , here in myn hond q¶ she
The nexte thyngö , that I requere the
Thow shalt it do , if it be in thy mygút
And I wyl telle it ©ow , er it be nygút
